run_metadata.coverage_summary: Daily incremental run. Tier 1 Commonwealth (AusTender) swept via web search: captured three fresh/closing-soon Approaches to Market (FSANZ food analysis panel, One Health National Conference 2027 event management, AFMA Southern Bluefin Tuna fishery monitoring). Tier 1 state portals (buy.nsw, Buying for Victoria, QTenders, Tenders WA) checked for new July-2026 items; most open NSW opportunities were already captured in prior runs and remain tracked in the aggregate. Tier 2/3 source discovery was the focus this run: two genuinely new buyer-originated sources found and recorded (Endeavour Energy on SAP Ariba; SSROC regional council procurement on VendorPanel). SAP Ariba Discovery (Tier 3) confirmed as registration-gated with no publicly-visible AU opportunity extractable without login.
gaps: www.tenders.gov.au (AusTender) is blocked by this session's egress network policy (proxy returns 403 to CONNECT); ATM detail pages could not be opened directly. Commonwealth entries were captured at headline level from web-search result snippets and are flagged entries_pending_detail.

buy.nsw.gov.au, tenders.vic.gov.au, endeavourenergy.com.au and ssroc.nsw.gov.au reached the origin but returned HTTP 403 to the fetch tool (bot/WAF block); detail pages could not be scraped. Headline data taken from search snippets.

SAP Ariba Discovery / SAP Business Network Discovery: opportunity list is registration-gated; no publicly-visible AU RFx could be captured without an authenticated supplier session. Recorded as a portal source only, not fabricated as a tender.

SSROC tenders T2025-16 and T2025-12 confirmed as current via search, but closing dates and full scope were not publicly extractable this run (VendorPanel detail behind portal) - dates left null, pending a detail pass.
Tier 2 sampling only: universities/TAFEs, most local councils, and health districts were not exhaustively swept this run; rotated to energy-network GBE and NSW regional council procurement instead.
recommended_seed_additions: Endeavour Energy - Suppliers / Tendering & EOI (SAP Ariba) - NSW electricity distribution network GBE not previously in the known source list.
Southern Sydney Regional Organisation of Councils (SSROC) - joint/regional council procurement via VendorPanel; aggregates tenders for 12 NSW member councils.
Consider an authenticated SAP Ariba Discovery supplier account so future runs can read gated corporate RFx detail.

tenders.title: Provision of Food Analysis Services (FSANZ Laboratory Panel)
tenders.description: Request for Tender to establish a panel for the provision of food analysis (laboratory testing) services to Food Standards Australia New Zealand.
tenders.deliverables_summary: Supplier(s) to provide accredited food analysis / laboratory testing services to FSANZ under a panel arrangement. Full scope and required test categories are in the tender documents, which are hosted on the FSANZ website.
tenders.reasoning: Found via web search of the AusTender current ATM list; buyer-originated Commonwealth procurement published on AusTender with supporting documents on the FSANZ (buyer) website.
tenders.notes: Headline-level only: AusTender ATM detail page is blocked by this session's egress policy (403), so scope, evaluation criteria and value could not be extracted. Closing date/time and contact email taken from AusTender search snippet. Pending detail pass.

tenders.title: One Health National Conference 2027 - Event Management Services
tenders.description: Request for Tender for the provision of event management services to deliver the One Health National Conference 2027.
tenders.deliverables_summary: Supplier to plan and deliver end-to-end event management for the 2027 One Health National Conference. Full scope is in the tender documents on AusTender.
tenders.reasoning: Found via web search of the AusTender current ATM list; buyer-originated Commonwealth procurement on AusTender.
tenders.notes: Headline-level only. AusTender ATM detail page unreachable this session (egress policy 403), so the buying agency, value and scope could not be confirmed - buyer left blank rather than guessed. Closing date/time from AusTender search snippet. Pending detail pass.

tenders.title: Fishery Monitoring Services - Southern Bluefin Tuna (SBT) Fishery
tenders.description: Provision of fishery monitoring services for the Southern Bluefin Tuna (SBT) Fishery.
tenders.deliverables_summary: Supplier to deliver monitoring services for the Southern Bluefin Tuna fishery (e.g. catch/effort and compliance monitoring). Full scope is in the AusTender tender documents.
tenders.reasoning: Found via web search of the AusTender current ATM list; buyer-originated Commonwealth procurement (AFMA) on AusTender.
tenders.notes: Headline-level only. Closes today (RUN_DATE) at 5:00 PM ACT, so effectively closing-soon. AusTender detail page unreachable this session (egress policy 403). Buyer inferred from the fishery context (AFMA administers the SBT fishery); confirm on detail page. Pending detail pass.

tenders.title: Sustainable Pavements - Road Construction Material & Related Services
tenders.buyer: Southern Sydney Regional Organisation of Councils (SSROC) Incorporated
tenders.description: SSROC regional (joint-council) tender for the supply of sustainable road construction/pavement materials and related services on behalf of its member councils.
tenders.deliverables_summary: Supplier to provide sustainable pavement / road construction materials and related services under a panel arrangement available to SSROC's 12 member councils. Full scope and specifications are in the VendorPanel tender documents.
tenders.reasoning: Discovered while hunting for new sources: SSROC is a buyer-originated regional council procurement body (new to this routine) that publishes joint tenders via VendorPanel. This tender was listed as current on the SSROC procurement page.
tenders.notes: Headline-level only. SSROC page returned 403 to the fetch tool (WAF); closing date and full scope not publicly extractable this run. Contact email from search snippet. Pending detail pass.

tenders.title: Stationery, Furniture, Janitorial & Associated Products
tenders.buyer: Southern Sydney Regional Organisation of Councils (SSROC) Incorporated
tenders.description: SSROC regional (joint-council) tender for the supply of stationery, furniture, janitorial and associated products on behalf of its member councils.
tenders.deliverables_summary: Supplier(s) to provide stationery, furniture, janitorial and associated products under a regional panel available to SSROC member councils. Full scope and product categories are in the VendorPanel tender documents.
tenders.reasoning: Discovered via SSROC source discovery (see above); listed as a current SSROC tender on the procurement page, published via VendorPanel.
tenders.notes: Headline-level only. SSROC page returned 403 to the fetch tool; closing date and full scope not publicly extractable this run. Confirm whether still open. Pending detail pass.

discovered_sources.how_discovered: Web search for NSW network/utility procurement portals; Endeavour Energy's supplier page states all tenders (RFT/RFP/RFI) are managed on the SAP Ariba e-sourcing platform and require SAP Ariba registration to receive alerts and submit responses.
discovered_sources.notes: NSW electricity distribution network (government-owned/GBE lineage). Buyer-originated; opportunities are registration-gated on SAP Ariba. Procurement contact: procurement@endeavourenergy.com.au. Not previously in the known-source list. Individual opportunities not captured (login-gated) - recorded as a portal only.

discovered_sources.source_name: Southern Sydney Regional Organisation of Councils (SSROC) - Tenders, Quotations & EOIs
discovered_sources.how_discovered: Source-discovery search for NSW regional/joint council procurement; SSROC is an incorporated association of 12 southern-Sydney councils that runs joint tenders and publishes/receives submissions via the VendorPanel portal.
discovered_sources.notes: Buyer-originated regional procurement body (not an aggregator). Current tenders observed include T2025-16 (Sustainable Pavements) and T2025-12 (Stationery/Furniture/Janitorial). Contact: procurement@ssroc.nsw.gov.au. Public listing visible; full detail and lodgement via VendorPanel. New to this routine.

discovered_sources.how_discovered: Known canonical Tier 1 source, re-checked this run.
discovered_sources.notes: Reachable via web search only this run: direct fetch of tenders.gov.au is blocked by the session egress policy (403 to CONNECT). ATM detail pages could not be scraped; captured items are headline-level.

discovered_sources.source_name: SAP Ariba Discovery / SAP Business Network Discovery
discovered_sources.how_discovered: Mandatory Tier 3 check re-run this run.
discovered_sources.notes: Public posting board for corporate RFx, but AU opportunity detail is registration-gated. No publicly-visible AU opportunity extractable without an authenticated supplier session this run; recorded as portal only, no tender fabricated.

discovered_sources.source_name: Food Standards Australia New Zealand (FSANZ) - Laboratory Panel / tenders
discovered_sources.how_discovered: Followed from the AusTender FSANZ-2026/6 ATM to the buyer's own website where tender documents are hosted.
discovered_sources.notes: Buyer-originated Commonwealth agency page hosting the current food-analysis laboratory panel RFT documents; complements the AusTender listing.
